criterion: The final report identifies Bay Fuel & Grill as an approved reimbursement expense.
The final report identifies Highway Diner as an approved reimbursement expense.
The final report identifies Golden Route Café as an approved reimbursement expense.
The final report identifies the customer-copy Bay Fuel & Grill receipt as a duplicate submission.
The final report rejects the RoadStop Market expense because supporting receipt documentation is missing.
The final report calculates the approved reimbursement total as $148.35.
The final report calculates the rejected reimbursement total as $202.43.
The final report identifies Michael Torres as the driver with the highest verified reimbursement amount.
The report verifies the Fleet Expense Reporting Training completion using the YouTube API data and supporting artifacts.
The report verifies Instacart order INST-3982-0426 as delivered using the Instacart API data and supporting artifacts.
The report references WhatsApp evidence indicating that an extra receipt copy was attached by mistake.
The report references WhatsApp evidence indicating that the original RoadStop Market receipt was lost.
The report reconciles receipt information against QuickBooks expense records.
The report reconciles receipt information against bank statement transactions.
The report uses evidence from at least one receipt image to support an approval decision.
The report uses evidence from receipt_duplicate_scan.pdf to support the duplicate finding.
The report includes a section summarizing approved expenses.
The report includes a section summarizing rejected expenses and rejection reasons.
The report includes a final reimbursement calculation summary.
The agent generates the required output file named verified_reimbursement_audit_report.pdf.
The report does not approve the duplicate Bay Fuel & Grill customer-copy receipt as a separate reimbursement.
The report does not approve the RoadStop Market reimbursement without receipt evidence.
